summary: Iteration 141: Tested default today's date filters and export functionality for Mill Entries, Cash Book, and Vehicle Weight. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified date defaults, empty state messages, filter bar visibility, and export buttons.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three sections (Mill Entries, Cash Book, Vehicle Weight) now default to today's date. Vehicle Weight has a filter bar with RST No, Date From/To, Vehicle, Party, Mandi fields + Excel/PDF export buttons. The backend supports date_from, date_to, vehicle_no, party_name, farmer_name, rst_no query params for /api/vehicle-weight. Export endpoints /api/vehicle-weight/export/excel and /api/vehicle-weight/export/pdf work correctly with filters.

features_tested.mill_entries_date_default: PASS - date_from and date_to default to today
features_tested.mill_entries_empty_message: PASS - Shows 'Aaj ki koi Mill Entry nahi hai' when empty
features_tested.cashbook_date_default: PASS - date_from and date_to default to today
features_tested.cashbook_empty_message: PASS - Shows 'Aaj ka koi Cash Transaction nahi hua' when empty
features_tested.vehicle_weight_date_default: PASS - date_from and date_to default to today
features_tested.vehicle_weight_filter_bar: PASS - Filter bar visible with RST, Date, Vehicle, Party, Mandi fields
features_tested.vehicle_weight_filter_params: PASS - API accepts date_from, date_to, vehicle_no, party_name, farmer_name, rst_no
features_tested.vehicle_weight_filter_clear: PASS - Clear button resets dates to today
